text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Our nanny is hard at work, I hear. I imagine it's
because our family is coming together after so
long to celebrate your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that right? I wish she wouldn't—it's nothing
to get so excited about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, can you blame her? Our parents and other
relatives are taking time out of their busy
schedules to be there, so she wants to make it
special.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's just try to enjoy this time with our precious
family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Personally, I'm looking forward to simply being
able to speak with you. Perhaps we can reminisce
about old times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm your sister. Would it be anything else?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
All right. I suppose I should finally go and show
my face at home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That would be nice. Mother and Father are very
much looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of special events... will you be preparing
any of the food there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you needn't worry. Nanny will be personally
making all your favorites.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text:
Ah, really? I'd like to have some of your cooking
once in a while. It's light, like a dusting of snow...
